_readme: This file mixes two kinds of entries. (1) 'sample': true entries are PLACEHOLDER shark-monitoring points — real SLSS shark-spotting program data (location/date/species) is NOT included pending confirmation with KJR that AI First Nations may surface it in this tool, since that program runs under the KJR Services Agreement which assigns IP in engagement deliverables/data to KJR. Do not populate those with real SLSS data until confirmed — see AIFN-Knowledge-Base wiki 'Drone Data Sovereignty Platform - Gap Analysis.md'. (2) 'sample': false entries are real site data supplied directly by John/AIFN field operations. Coordinates without a public address/landmark source were taken as given by John; a few had their latitude sign corrected from positive to negative (southern hemisphere) per his confirmation on 2026-07-21. Entries with lat/lng null are real sites still awaiting exact GPS confirmation — rendered as a list below the map, not a pin.

sites.name: Placeholder Marine Monitoring Point 1
sites.notes: Placeholder entry only. Represents the kind of coastal monitoring point that would be logged during a real marine wildlife survey pass.

sites.name: Placeholder Coastal Watch Zone
sites.notes: Placeholder entry representing a general coastal wildlife monitoring zone, not a specific detection.

sites.name: Cassowary — Male + 2 Chicks, 1 Riley Street
sites.species: Southern Cassowary (Casuarius casuarius johnsonii) — adult male with 2 chicks (~3 months old)
sites.notes: Property: 1 Riley Street, South Innisfail. Southern Cassowary is Endangered under the EPBC Act — males rear chicks alone, consistent with this grouping. Coordinates from the property's public street address (Riley Street, South Innisfail); not a survey-confirmed pin.

sites.name: Cassowary — Female (Mother), 1 Riley Street
sites.species: Southern Cassowary (Casuarius casuarius johnsonii) — adult female
sites.notes: Property: 1 Riley Street, South Innisfail. Healthy adult female, same property as the male/chick group — offset slightly on the map so both markers are visible; not a separate confirmed GPS fix.

sites.name: Feral Pig Activity — 1 Riley Street
sites.notes: Property: 1 Riley Street, South Innisfail. Biosecurity/environmental concern — consistent with AIFN's feral pig monitoring work through the Goondoi ranger program.

sites.name: Seagrass Nursery — Mourilyan Harbour
sites.species: Seagrass nursery habitat (juvenile dugong/turtle foraging habitat)
sites.notes: Mourilyan Harbour estuary. Coordinates from the public port/harbour location, not a survey-confirmed nursery boundary.

sites.name: Green Turtle Nesting Beach — Ellabay Pty, Flying Fish Point
sites.notes: Ellabay Pty block, Flying Fish Point. Shares coordinates with the crocodile nesting entry below (same property block) — confirm the precise nest location on ground when available.

sites.name: Wallaby Sanctuary — Coquette Point, Lot 365
sites.notes: Sanctuary area on Lot 365, Coquette Point. Exact GPS not yet supplied — listed here, not plotted, until confirmed.

sites.name: Estuarine Crocodile — Large Black Male (territory)
sites.notes: Large, dark-coloured individual regularly sighted in this territory. Flag as a caution zone for any field operations nearby.

sites.name: Crocodile Nesting Site — Ellabay Pty
sites.notes: Ellabay Pty property block — same location as the Green Turtle nesting entry above.

sites.name: Mangrove Survey Zone — Goondoi
sites.notes: Mangrove monitoring area associated with the Goondoi Rangers environmental program. Exact GPS not yet supplied.

sites.name: Wetland Survey Zone — Goondoi
sites.notes: Wetland monitoring area associated with the Goondoi Rangers environmental program. Exact GPS not yet supplied.

sites.name: Polly Creek — Ceremony Place
sites.notes: Cultural / ceremony site — not a wildlife detection point. Sensitive location: treat with cultural protocol and restrict sharing beyond this access-gated portal.
